name: Won Ton Soup (Won Ton Tong)
recipeIngredient: 30 won tons filled according to a won ton recipe
1 quart chicken and pork stock [or either one]
1 tsp sesame oil [the dark, cooked Oriental type]
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the wonton filling and wrap as in a won ton recipe.
2. Heat the stock until hot.
3. Bring a pot of water to a boil. Add the wontons and cook for 4 to 5 minutes.
4. Remove the wontons with a bamboo skimmer or slotted spoon and transfer to soup bowls.
5. Garnish with sliced roast pork and chopped green onions.
6. Pour heated stock over the wontons.
7. Drizzle sesame oil over the wontons and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
